volumeHelp: Tobetsa ho fihlella molumo oa molumo
statusUsingDesc: Ho sebelisa mofuta o hlalositsoeng oa audio
statusLoadingDesc: E kenya mofuta o nang le litlhaloso tsa molumo
statusUsingNoDesc: Ho sebelisa mofuta ntle le tlhaloso ea molumo
statusLoadingNoDesc: E kenya mofuta ona ntle le tlhaloso ea molumo
alertDescribedVersion: Ho sebelisa mofuta oa audio o hlalositsoeng oa video
alertNonDescribedVersion: Ho sebelisa mofuta ntle le tlhaloso ea molumo ea video
fallbackError1: Sebatli sa hau ha se sebetse
fallbackError2: Libatli tse latelang li tsamaisana le sebapali sena
prefIntroCaptions: Likhetho tse latelang li laola hore na li-subtitles li hlahisoa joang.
prefIntroDescription1: Sebapali sena se tšehetsa tlhaloso ea molumo ka litsela tse peli:
prefIntroDescription2: Video ea hajoale e na le
prefIntroDescriptionNone: Video ea hajoale ha e na tlhaloso ea molumo ka mokhoa ofe kapa ofe.
prefIntroDescription3: Sebelisa foromo e ka tlase ho beha likhetho tsa hau bakeng sa tlhaloso ea molumo ka mongolo.
prefIntroDescription4: Kamora ho boloka litlhophiso, o ka bulela kapa oa tima tlhaloso ea molumo ka konopo e tšoanang.
prefIntroKeyboard1: Sebapali se leqepheng lena se ka sebetsoa ho tsoa kae kapa kae ho sebelisa likhaoletso tsa keyboard (sheba lenane le ka tlase).
prefIntroKeyboard2: O ka hlalosa linotlolo tsa ho fetola (Alt, Control le/kapa Shift).
prefIntroKeyboard3: ELA HLOKO: Metsoako e meng ea linotlolo e kanna ea hohlana le e sebelisoang ke sebatli sa hau le/kapa lits'ebetso tse ling. Leka likhokahano tse fapaneng le linotlolo tsa ho fetola ho fihlela u fumana tse u loketseng.
prefIntroTranscript: Likhetho tse latelang li ama mongolo o sebetsang.
prefCookieWarning: Ho boloka lintho tseo u li ratang, ho hlokahala hore li-cookie li sebelisoe.
prefHeadingKeyboard1: Likonopo tsa ho fetola li sebelisoa e le likhaoletso tsa keyboard
escapeKeyFunction: Koala puisano kapa popup ea hajoale
prefDescFormatHelp: Haeba liforomo ka bobeli li le teng, ho tla sebelisoa e le 'ngoe feela ea tsona.
prefDescFormatOption1: Video e 'ngoe e nang le litlhaloso tsa molumo tse kentsoeng (e rekotiloeng pele).
prefDescFormatOption1b: mofuta o mong o nang le tlhaloso ea molumo
prefDescFormatOption2: Tlhaloso ea mongolo e baloang ke sebali sa skrine (TTS)
prefDescPause: Emisa video ka bo eona ha tlhaloso e qala
prefDescVisible: Hlahisa tlhaloso ea mongolo haeba e lumelletsoe
sampleDescriptionText: Fetola litlhophiso tsa hau ho utloa mohlala oa mongolo.
prefHighlight: Totobatsa sengoloa ha litaba li ntse li tsoela pele
windowMoveLeft: Fesetere e suthiselitsoe ka ho le letšehali
windowMoveRight: Fesetere e suthiselitsoe ka ho le letona
signControls: Litaolo tsa Fesetere ea Puo ea Matsoho
windowMoveAlert: Hula kapa sebelisa linotlolo tsa metsu ho tsamaisa fensetere; Tobetsa Enter ho emisa.
windowSendBackAlert: Fesetere ena ha e ka morao ho ntho efe kapa efe.
windowBringTopAlert: Fesetere ena e se e le ka pele ho lintho tse ling tse leqepheng lena.
resultsSummary4: Tobetsa nako e amanang le ntho efe kapa efe ho bapala video ho tloha ntlheng eo.
productNameWeb: Sebapali se khonang TOHOM Web Edition
productNameWp: Able Player TOTHOM bakeng sa WordPress
webEditionDescription: Khatiso e ikhethileng le e atolositsoeng ea sebapali sa media se fumanehang Able Player. Liphetoho le mesebetsi e meng e ntlafalitsoeng ke TOTHOMweb ke lisebelisoa tsa software.
wpEditionDescription: WordPress plugin e eketsang widget ho Elementor, e etselitsoeng ho kopanya khatiso e hlophisitsoeng le e atolositsoeng ea sebapali sa media se fumanehang Able Player. Liphetoho le mesebetsi e meng e ntlafalitsoeng ke TOTHOMweb ke lisebelisoa tsa software.
thirdPartyDescription: Sehlahisoa sena se kenyelletsa software e latelang ea mohloli o bulehileng:
